Chronic Condition Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Prescriber Characteristics │ April 2021 │ V 1.1 ii 

Tips on Navigating the Codebook 

This document is a detailed codebook that describes each variable in the Medicare Part D Prescriber Characteristics research 
files. Because the files have many variables, we have included several ways for users to quickly find the information they 
need: 

• A complete listing of all variables in the files, in alphabetical order based on their SAS
